news.title: ASX snaps losing streak but inflation threats remain
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has closed in the green after a four-session losing streak, as data on inflation left the door open to higher interest rates.

news.title: ASX set to decline as Wall Street scuffles; Oil prices fall
news.snippet: Stocks wavered in afternoon trading on Wall Street as big technology stocks slipped and weighed on the broader market.

news.title: Fixed power fees jump up to 70 per cent after regulator curbs usage charges
news.snippet: While power bills are set to fall from July 1, sudden increases in energy retailers’ grid-connection charges threaten to dilute some of these savings.

news.title: True North eyes bigger Qld Cloncurry copper comeback prize
news.snippet: True North Copper has folded Mongoose into its Qld Cloncurry project, while chasing Wallace North growth and targeting a Q4 PFS as its copper production comeback gathers momentum.

news.title: Knights player Kepaoa banned for six weeks for homophobic slur
WFH is linked to worse mental health – but it’s a big boost for some
news.snippet: Some remote workers go days without human contact and many have worse mental health, according to one study. But experts say that link is tenuous, with strong benefits for some groups.

news.title: Stefanovic’s future at Nine under a cloud amid emergency meetings
news.snippet: The Nine presenter’s controversial podcast interview with Tommy Robinson disappeared just 12 hours after going live. Sources said it was not removed by tech platforms.

news.title: Wayne Bennett rubbishes 'myths' around South Sydney's injuries
Squash star ignores critics after joining Australia
